name: feishu
description: Official Feishu (Lark) CLI by Larksuite. Manage Feishu messages, calendars, docs and more with OAuth browser login.
author: Larksuite

args_schema.name: action
args_schema.description: Action to perform: 'login' for OAuth browser authentication, 'run' to execute a lark-cli command.

args_schema.name: input
args_schema.description: The lark-cli sub-command to run (only required if action is 'run').
